content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the failure reconciliation implementation. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and cargo fmt --check passes. The implementation correctly: records BeadFailed journal events with bead_id/task_id/attempt/error; leaves beads open on failure (no br close); counts attempts across retries including same-run-id and replacement-project scenarios; escalates to NeedsOperator after MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES=3; maintains idempotency for replayed runs; handles stale replay edge cases without clobbering newer attempts; transitions controller to Blocked (retryable) or NeedsOperator (escalated); emits structured tracing at warn/error levels. The controller state machine changes (Blocked→Running, Blocked→Reconciling transitions; Blocked preserves active context) are correct for the retry workflow. The daemon_loop integration has 8+ dedicated tests covering metadata extraction, durable/snapshot fallback, stale rejection, and same-run-id retry scenarios. No bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
